title: edritria livida
intro: Edritria livida, also known as the Green Gold or Green Gold of India, is a tropical vine plant native to the forests of southern India. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Edritria livida include reducing fever and inflammation, as well as treating various skin conditions and respiratory issues. Edritria livida is commonly prepared as a herbal decoction or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
